problem id: 7c206ce2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(7)

examples:
  11011000 -> 00000000
  11100110 -> 00000000
  01100111 -> 10000000
  10011101 -> 10000000
  10111010 -> 00000000
  11010110 -> 00000000
  11010000 -> 00000000
  00100110 -> 00000000
  01101001 -> 00000000
  01110100 -> 00000000

query: 01110011
predicted answer: 00000000
